title: Discovered Enough Items
description: Items are hidden from recipe viewers until they are discovered for the first time
body:
Overview


This mod hides items and their tooltips until they are picked up by the player.

An item that has not been discovered yet will have it's model blacked out, it's name replaced with ??? and most of it's tooltips removed.

Discovered items are stored client side on a per world basis in the dei/ folder.
![Undiscovered items in the creative menu, models are blacked out with a ? on them](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea17ffd8b0b79860921f4f2f205c4a129456f970.png)
